name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Group And Account Reconnaissance Activity Using Net.EXE
notes:
Detects suspicious reconnaissance command line activity on Windows systems using Net.EXE

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), omkar72, @svch0st, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Group And Account Reconnaissance Activity Using Net.EXE
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious reconnaissance command line activity on Windows systems using Net.EXE


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Group And Account Reconnaissance Activity Using Net.EXE on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [net.exe or net1.exe]

when the event matches ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '% group %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% localgroup %') and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%domain admins%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% administrator%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% administrateur%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%enterprise admins%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%exchange trusted subsystem%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%remote desktop users%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%utilisateurs du bureau à distance%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%usuarios de escritorio remoto%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /do%')) AQL filter query
when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /add%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% accounts %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /do%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Group And Account Reconnaissance Activity Using Net.EXE on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [net.exe or net1.exe]

AND when the event matches ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '% group %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% localgroup %') and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%domain admins%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% administrator%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% administrateur%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%enterprise admins%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%exchange trusted subsystem%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%remote desktop users%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%utilisateurs du bureau à distance%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%usuarios de escritorio remoto%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /do%')) AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /add%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% accounts %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /do%') AQL filter query
